root.sql:
select -- กลุ่มข้าราชการ
pkb_ktm.fp_get_count_age_memno(sysdate,5,'1') as age_year5_1 ,pkb_ktm.fp_get_count_age_memno(sysdate,10,'1') as age_year10_1 ,pkb_ktm.fp_get_count_age_memno(sysdate,15,'1') as age_year15_1 ,pkb_ktm.fp_get_count_age_memno(sysdate,20,'1') as age_year20_1 ,pkb_ktm.fp_get_count_age_memno(sysdate,25,'1') as age_year25_1 ,pkb_ktm.fp_get_count_age_memno(sysdate,30,'1') as age_year30_1 ,pkb_ktm.fp_get_count_age_memno(sysdate,35,'1') as age_year35_1 ,pkb_ktm.fp_get_count_age_memno(sysdate,99,'1') as age_year99_1 -- กลุ่มลูกจ้าง ,pkb_ktm.fp_get_count_age_memno(sysdate,5,'2') as age_year5_2 ,pkb_ktm.fp_get_count_age_memno(sysdate,10,'2') as age_year10_2 ,pkb_ktm.fp_get_count_age_memno(sysdate,15,'2') as age_year15_2 ,pkb_ktm.fp_get_count_age_memno(sysdate,20,'2') as age_year20_2 ,pkb_ktm.fp_get_count_age_memno(sysdate,25,'2') as age_year25_2 ,pkb_ktm.fp_get_count_age_memno(sysdate,30,'2') as age_year30_2 ,pkb_ktm.fp_get_count_age_memno(sysdate,35,'2') as age_year35_2 ,pkb_ktm.fp_get_count_age_memno(sysdate,99,'2') as age_year99_2 from dual
